zh.lifeSummary: 當Garciana Branch於大約1393年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏丹華斯時，她的父親Sir Hamon Mascy of Rixton34歲，母親Katherine Massey82歲。她於從1417年到1418年與John Atte de la Hyde在英國波克夏丹華斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1487年9月19日在英國英格蘭享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Garciana Branch于大约1393年出生在英国英格兰波克夏丹華斯时，她的父亲Sir Hamon Mascy of Rixton34岁，母亲Katherine Massey82岁。她于从1417年到1418年与John Atte de la Hyde在英国波克夏丹華斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1487年9月19日在英国英格兰享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Branch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name or nickname from Middle English braunch ‘branch’ (Old French branche, braunche), of uncertain application (compare German Zweig ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘branch’, e.g. German   Zweig   (compare   Labranche  ), French   Branche  , and Swedish   Gren  .

variants.name: Gren
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Gunner, Lars.

Swedish: ornamental name from gren ‘branch’ (Old Norse grein). It is possible that in some cases the name have been chosen with some reference to the notion of the ‘branches’ making up a family ‘tree’. Compare Branch .

variants.name: Zweig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Isadore, Yochanan, Akiva, Arie, Aron, Elchanan, Hyman, Moishe, Moshe, Shimon.  German Gerd, Hans, Manfred, Reinhold, Arnulf, Herta, Kurt.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German zwīg ‘branch, bough, twig, graft’, German Zweig, applied perhaps as a nickname for a new member in a family, offspring or as an occupational name for a horticultural expert. The Jewish surname is artificial. Compare Branch .

en.lifeSummary: When Garciana Branch was born about 1393, in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Hamon Mascy of Rixton, was 34 and her mother, Katherine Massey, was 82. She married John Atte de la Hyde from 1417 to 1418, in Denchworth, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 19 September 1487, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Garciana Branch est née environ 1393, à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hamon Mascy of Rixton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Katherine Massey, avait 82 ans. Elle a épousé John Atte de la Hyde du 1417 au 1418, à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 19 septembre 1487, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Garciana Branch um 1393 in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hamon Mascy of Rixton 34 und ihre Mutter Katherine Massey 82. Sie hat von 1417 bis 1418 in Denchworth, Berkshire, England John Atte de la Hyde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 19. September 1487 im Alter von 95 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Garciana Branch è nata il circa 1393 nel Denchworth, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Hamon Mascy of Rixton, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Katherine Massey, aveva 82 anni. Lei sposato John Atte de la Hyde da 1417 a 1418, nel Denchworth, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 19 settembre 1487, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Garciana Branchが約1393年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアデンチウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Hamon Mascy of Rixtonは34歳，母Katherine Masseyは82歳であった。から1417年まで1418年にイギリスバークシュアイアデンチウオルスでJohn Atte de la Hydeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1487年9月19日にイギリスイギリスで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Garciana Branch(이)가 대략 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 덴ch워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hamon Mascy of Rixton(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Massey(은)는 82세였다. 그녀는 1417년 부터 1418년 까지 영국 버크실르 덴ch워스에서 John Atte de la Hyde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1487년 9월 19일 영국 잉글랜드에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Garciana Branch nasceu aproximadamente 1393, em Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hamon Mascy of Rixton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Massey, tinha 82 anos. Ela casou-se com John Atte de la Hyde de 1417 a 1418, em Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 19 de setembro de 1487, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Garciana Branch родилась около 1393 г. в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Hamon Mascy of Rixton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Massey, 82. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Atte de la Hyde с 1417 по 1418 в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 19 сентября 1487 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет.
